title: Planet Classes Scanned
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Scan WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND PlanetClass IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(PlanetClass, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Scan WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND PlanetClass IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PlanetClass ORDER BY value DESC
